name: The Grail of Yesterday and Tomorrow

sheet.name: The Grail of Yesterday and Tomorrow
sheet.background_story:
One of the most recognizable knights in the Forsaken Lands, Glorian Grail descends from the line of Vareign the Luminary, founder of "Paragon of the Spectrum". 

Winning the lineage lottery comes with its own unique burdens and under his proud and confident demeanor, Glorian harbors doubt on being able to live up to the legacy of the Gold Banner. He espouses the "Radiant Heart": Exuding valor and courage in the face of adversity.

description:
One of the most recognizable knights in the Forsaken Lands, Glorian Grail descends from the line of Vareign the Luminary, founder of "Paragon of the Spectrum". 

Winning the lineage lottery comes with its own unique burdens and under his proud and confident demeanor, Glorian harbors doubt on being able to live up to the legacy of the Gold Banner. He espouses the "Radiant Heart": Exuding valor and courage in the face of adversity.
